texto: Laughter is binary: It either happens or it doesn't. As each joke arrives in the course of a film, the cavernous space of the theater is either filled with joy and laughter or with the quiet of cringing embarrassment. Every time you step to the plate to make a joke, you're going to experience one or the other.
explicacao: Citação de David Dobkin sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Laughter is binary: It either happens or it doesn't. As each joke arrives in the course of a film…” articula humor, time, experience em registro de humor, com relevância para contextos como experience e laughter.
